# plane_project (Resource)

A Plane project within a workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "plane_project" "platform" {
  workspace_slug = "my-workspace"
  name           = "Platform"
  identifier     = "PLAT"
  description    = "Platform engineering work"

  cycle_view  = true
  module_view = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `identifier` (String) Short project identifier used as the work-item key prefix (max 12 characters). Changing it forces a new project: Plane allows the field in PATCH, but altering it in place can break existing work-item references, so this provider treats it as immutable until verified safe.
- `name` (String) Project name (max 255 characters).
- `workspace_slug` (String) Slug of the workspace that owns the project. Changing this forces a new project.

### Optional

- `archive_in` (Number) Months of inactivity after which work items auto-archive (0 disables).
- `close_in` (Number) Months of inactivity after which work items auto-close (0 disables).
- `cycle_view` (Boolean) Whether the Cycles feature is enabled.
- `default_assignee` (String) User UUID of the default work-item assignee.
- `description` (String) Project description.
- `intake_view` (Boolean) Whether the Intake feature is enabled.
- `issue_views_view` (Boolean) Whether the Views feature is enabled.
- `module_view` (Boolean) Whether the Modules feature is enabled.
- `page_view` (Boolean) Whether the Pages feature is enabled.
- `project_lead` (String) User UUID of the project lead.
- `timezone` (String) Project timezone (IANA name).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Project UUID, assigned by Plane.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp.
- `workspace` (String) UUID of the owning workspace.
